chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1203 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.15 a/w reply of counsel thereof as Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.9137/2024 3. For hearing of main case 18.11.2025 None present for the petitioner --------- This petition was filed on 09.10.2024, and was placed before the Court on 16.10.2024, when the petitioner was directed to come prepared and argue the matter. The petition was again fixed on 11.11.2025 but none was in attendance on behalf of the petitioner. Today, same is the position, which reflects that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this matter. Further per bailiff’s report, he went to the house of the petitioner on the address given in the memo of petition but none was available in the house. Since the petitioner is not in attendance for more than one year, therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss this petition for non-prosecution. JUDGE Nadir*
